name: Peanut Butter & Banana Bread (Abm)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine yeast and warm water. Let it sit for about 5 minutes until bubbly.
3. Add bread flour, wheat flour, gluten, brown sugar, and salt to the yeast mixture. Mix well until a dough forms.
4. Stir in peanut butter and egg until incorporated.
5. Weigh down the dough with bananas on top (sliced).
6. Place the dough into a greased loaf pan and shape it into a loaf.
7. Cover the pan with a lid or plastic wrap and let it rise at room temperature for about 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
8. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C) and bake for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the side.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
